project.testCommand: npm run lint && npm run security
project.devServer: python3 -m http.server 5641 (from repo root; harness fetches /popup.html + real scripts)
project.branchPattern: one branch per BUILD: feature/bulk-delete (BD*), feature/pro-b2-phase3-billing (B3*); stories commit onto the build branch
project.mergePolicy: push branch + open PR (gh pr create) when all of a build's stories pass machine verification; PR body carries LB's live-test checklist; merge ONLY on LB's word after his real-browser test. Never commit to main.
rules: Stripe TEST MODE ONLY until LB says otherwise
secrets only in Supabase Edge Function secrets, never repo/chat
no silent automation changing what data leaves a device
no 4.0.0 version bump / CHANGELOG until store upload is prepared
claude-in-chrome cannot open chrome-extension:// pages; popup UI is verified via the test-harness on localhost, real-extension checks are LB's

stories.title: Popup test harness (dev-only)
stories.description: Create test-harness/ serving the REAL popup.html + popup.js + sync-*.js on localhost with a chrome-shim.js: in-memory chrome.storage.local/sync, stubbed identity/runtime/alarms/contextMenus, window.confirm auto-accept logging to window.__confirmCalls, fetch shim capturing Supabase request bodies to window.__fetchLog, seedable fixtures (10 prompts, mixed tags/favorites/sensitive, optional uuids + cloud mode). Add test-harness/ to CLAUDE.md never-include list and verify it is not in the pack-and-ship zip command.
acceptanceCriteria: real popup renders on localhost with seeded data
shim covers every chrome.* call popup.js makes at load

chromeVerification.setup: python3 -m http.server 5641 --directory test-harness (harness copies/rewrites nothing; it loads ../popup.html assets via symlink or fetch-served root — implementer picks the mechanism that keeps popup.html unmodified)
assertions: exactly 10 .prompt-item cards render from seeded fixtures
search box filters cards live (type a fixture title substring, card count drops)
window.__confirmCalls exists and confirm() is the shim (call it via javascript_tool, returns true and logs)
zero console errors after load + one search interaction

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED, observed in Chrome. Mechanism: loader.js fetches real /popup.html, injects <base href=/> + chrome-shim.js before first script, runs in same-origin srcdoc iframe (natural DOMContentLoaded). Assert via popupFrame.contentWindow. Verified all 3 modes: local (10 cards, search 10->1->10, confirm shim logs+accepts), cloud (10 cards, 8 uuids, shim intercepted GET profiles + GET prompts pull, 'Cloud sync on' status, zero console errors on tracked load), sync (10 cards, clean). Cloud seed: 8 uuid'd + 2 local-only (BD3 uses this). pb_last_push seeded AFTER fixture updatedAt so no spurious first push. __fetchLog entries carry tombstonesAtSend snapshot for BD3 ordering assertion. Serve REPO ROOT: python3 -m http.server 5641.

stories.title: Selection mode UI (Select toggle, checkboxes, action bar)
stories.description: Add Select button to toolbar; selectionMode + selectedIds Set (module-level, session-only); checkboxes on cards rendered from selectedIds in createPromptHTML; fixed bottom action bar with live count, Select all (visible set), Delete (N) disabled at 0, Cancel. Checkbox clicks via delegated handlePromptButtonClick data-action. Cancel/Escape exits and clears. CSS tokens only, dark-mode via existing overrides.

assertions: clicking Select renders a checkbox in every visible card and shows the action bar
checking 3 cards makes the count read '3 selected' and Delete button reads 'Delete (3)' and is enabled
Delete button is disabled when 0 selected
Select all checks all visible cards (count equals visible card count)
Cancel hides checkboxes + action bar and clears selectedIds (re-entering shows 0 selected)
Escape exits selection mode identically to Cancel
in normal mode: copy/edit/star buttons still dispatch (click star toggles isFavorite in shim storage)
zero console errors across the flow
needsHumanEye: action bar visual fit in the real popup (spacing, does not cover last card)

notes: 2026-07-10: all machine assertions PASSED in harness (local mode): 10/10 checkboxes, live count 0/3/10, Delete disabled at 0 + 'Delete (3)' enabled, Select all -> 10 checked, Cancel + Escape both exit and clear, normal-mode regression clean (star flips shim storage, edit opens form, single delete via shimmed confirm 10->9), zero console errors, dark-mode screenshot evidence. bulkDeleteBtn intentionally has NO click listener yet - bulkDeleteSelected + wiring land in BD2. LB eyeball: bar fit in real popup.

stories.title: Bulk delete — local/sync mode
stories.description: bulkDeleteSelected(): confirm('Delete N prompts? This cannot be undone.') with true total; resolve ids, one prompts.filter + single savePrompts, filterAndSortPrompts, exit mode. Confirm-cancel keeps selection and mode.
acceptanceCriteria: select-all under filter deletes only filtered set

flow: filter to a tag, select all, delete
select remaining, delete with shim set to reject once, then accept
assertions: window.__confirmCalls last message contains the exact selected count
after delete: DOM card count and shim storage prompts length both drop by exactly N
shim storage write count for the delete is exactly 1 savePrompts-driven write
tag-filtered select-all deletes only that tag's cards; other prompts intact in storage
deleting all remaining prompts renders the .no-prompts empty state
when confirm returns false: nothing deleted, selection mode + checked state intact
zero console errors

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED, all assertions observed in harness (local mode). confirm='Delete 3 prompts? This cannot be undone.' exact count; 10->7 DOM+storage with exactly 1 prompts write; confirm-cancel kept mode + 2 checked; Coding tag filter select-all deleted exactly the 2 Coding prompts (others intact, filtered empty state); delete-all -> storage empty + .no-prompts; zero console errors. bulkDeleteSelected implemented COMPLETE (incl. cloud tombstone loop) in this story; BD3 verifies the cloud path. Confirm copy pluralizes 1 prompt/N prompts. Also fixed harness fixture sortBy 'newest' -> 'title-asc' (invalid option value, select fell back to default silently).

stories.title: Bulk delete — cloud mode tombstones
stories.description: In cloud mode, before the single save: await PBSync.recordTombstone(uuid) sequentially for every selected prompt WITH a uuid; no-uuid prompts delete with no tombstone. The save's push then flushes prompts + all tombstones (existing two-homogeneous-POST design). Never bypass deletePrompt/recordTombstone semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: one tombstone per uuid'd victim in pb_tombstones before save

chromeVerification.setup: harness seeded in cloud mode: storagePref=cloud, pb_session + pb_is_pro in shim storage, 6 prompts with uuids + 2 without, fetch shim capturing POST bodies
assertions: pb_tombstones contained 4 uuids (with deleted_at) before the push fired (fetch shim can assert tombstones present in storage at POST time)
the tombstone POST body contains exactly the 4 uuids with deleted_at set; the no-uuid victim appears in no POST
pb_tombstones is empty after the successful shimmed push (flush behavior)
storage prompts length dropped by 5 and DOM matches
exactly one push cycle fired (no per-victim pushes)
zero console errors
needsHumanEye: real two-device propagation (LB: bulk delete on device A disappears on device B) — covered in PR live-test checklist

notes: 2026-07-10: all machine assertions PASSED in harness cloud mode (8 uuid'd + 2 no-uuid seeded; selected 4 uuid'd + 1 no-uuid). Observed: exactly ONE POST /rest/v1/prompts for the whole delete (changedRows=0 since fixtures predate pb_last_push cursor); body = exactly the 4 expected uuids, homogeneous {id, deleted_at, updated_at} rows with updated_at===deleted_at; tombstonesAtSend=4 (queue populated BEFORE push fired); pb_tombstones empty after flush; storage+DOM 10->5; no-uuid victim (Client Billing Notes) deleted locally, absent from every POST; other no-uuid prompt (Daily Standup) survived; zero console errors. LESSON: first probe raced the async chain at 900ms during an extension reconnect and looked like a hang - poll for completion instead of fixed sleeps. Remaining human item: real two-device propagation (PR checklist).

stories.title: Filter interplay + polish
stories.description: Selection persists across search/filter/sort changes including hidden-selected cards; count always true total; hidden-selected included in delete; dark-mode action bar styling via tokens.

flow: select 2 from tag A, filter to tag B, select 1 more, clear filter, delete all 3
toggle prefers-color-scheme dark via emulation or harness override
assertions: after filtering to tag B the count still reads '2 selected' then '3 selected' after adding one
confirm message says 3; all 3 deleted including the two hidden at selection time
re-rendered checkboxes under changed filters reflect selectedIds (checked state re-derived)
action bar colors in dark mode come from the token palette (computed background != light-mode value)
zero console errors
needsHumanEye: dark-mode visual polish of checkboxes + action bar in the real popup

notes: 2026-07-10: all machine assertions PASSED in harness. Selected 2 under Writing filter -> switched to Coding filter: count stayed '2 selected' with 0 visible checked (persistence across hidden) -> added 1 -> '3 selected' -> cleared filter: exactly 3 checked with correct titles (re-derived state) -> delete confirmed '3', both formerly-hidden Writing cards deleted (writingRemaining 0). Theme: bulk bar bg rgb(39,39,42) dark / rgb(247,247,248) light / back, via popup's own themeToggleBtn; delete button uses danger token. Escape exits. Zero console errors. No code changes needed - BD1's re-derive design covered everything. LB eyeball: dark-mode checkbox + bar polish in real popup.

stories.title: Whole-branch review + PR (build 1 land)
stories.description: Whole-branch subagent review of feature/bulk-delete (Phase 2 pattern), fix findings, re-verify affected stories, push branch, gh pr create with LB live-test checklist (real popup selection UX, real cloud bulk delete to device B, dark mode look). Merge only on LB word.

chromeVerification.setup: n/a (review story) — re-run any harness assertions invalidated by review fixes
assertions: gh pr view returns the open PR URL
needsHumanEye: LB live-test checklist in PR body

notes: 2026-07-10: whole-branch review (feature-dev reviewer) found 1 Critical + 3 Important, all real; fixed in eb5606f (victimIds snapshot; bulkDeleteInFlight re-entrancy guard + bar disable; escapeHTMLAttr for aria-label; deletePrompt evicts from selectedIds). All re-verified live in harness. Re-review verdict: READY, zero new issues; one sub-threshold cosmetic nit noted (transient count tick during concurrent per-card delete + in-flight bulk, cosmetic only). Reviewer follow-up ticket suggestion (pre-existing, out of scope): tag-name value=/data-original-name=/data-tag= attribute sinks also rely on quote-less escapeHTML - candidate for escapeHTMLAttr sweep in a later cycle. PR #5 open (https://github.com/lbwalton/prompt-box-extension/pull/5); merge gated on LB live test. NOTE: BD stories live on feature/bulk-delete; B3 stories on feature/pro-b2-phase3-billing (harness cherry-picked, prd.json carried forward - trivial conflict on whichever PR merges second, keep the union).

stories.title: Migration 0003 (RLS is_pro write predicate + stripe_events) + Stripe runbook
stories.description: supabase/migrations/0003_billing.sql: stripe_events idempotency table (RLS on, no client policies); prompts INSERT/UPDATE policies require profiles.is_pro (SELECT stays owner-only); security-definer lifetime_count(). Plus supabase/SETUP-stripe-billing.md runbook (secrets, config, migration apply, deploys, webhook endpoint, stripe CLI smoke test) per the SETUP-google-oauth.md pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL applies cleanly on the existing 0001+0002 schema
expired-pro write rejected, owner read allowed
runbook complete with no secrets in it

chromeVerification.setup: static: SQL reviewed against 0001/0002 (no live DB until LB applies per runbook)
assertions: 0003 references only objects that exist in 0001/0002 (trace by read)
no secret values anywhere in the new files
lifetime_count() is security definer and NOT granted to anon/authenticated
needsHumanEye: LB applies 0003 in the dashboard (runbook step); post-apply I verify policies via dashboard/REST

notes: 2026-07-10: machine assertions PASSED (static). 0003 traced against 0001/0002: replaces prompts_all_own with per-command policies (select/delete owner-only; insert/update owner AND is_pro_user()); is_pro_user() granted to authenticated+anon because RLS policy expressions execute with the querying role's privileges (revoking would break the policy); lifetime_count() security definer with PUBLIC execute revoked + explicit service_role grant; stripe_events RLS-on-no-policies (service-role only). Secret scan clean (placeholders only in runbook). Docker down + no local psql -> live apply verification deferred to the runbook step (LB applies, I verify pg_policies via dashboard). deno NOT installed locally - B3-2/3 deno check needs brew install deno or falls back to review + deploy-time typecheck.

stories.title: Edge Function create-checkout
stories.description: supabase/functions/create-checkout/index.ts: JWT verify (401), plan allowlist from env price IDs (400), lifetime 100-cap via lifetime_count() (409 lifetime_sold_out), create/reuse stripe_customer_id (service role), Checkout Session (subscription vs payment mode, client_reference_id + metadata.user_id + metadata.plan), returns {url}. CORS for extension origin + OPTIONS.

chromeVerification.setup: deno check + code review pre-deploy; live curl of 401/400 paths lands in B3-4 after LB deploys
assertions: deno check supabase/functions/create-checkout/index.ts exits 0
grep: no sk_test/sk_live/whsec anywhere in supabase/functions/
chromeVerification.notes-inline: live 401/400/409 curls + checkout URL creation verified in B3-4 once deployed

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED. deno 2.9.2 installed via brew; deno check exits 0 (npm:stripe@17.7.0 + jsr:@supabase/supabase-js@2.110.2). Added supabase/functions/deno.json (nodeModulesDir auto) + .gitignore for its node_modules - required because the repo's package.json puts deno in byonm mode. Secret scan clean. Flow: OPTIONS/405 guard -> env presence 500 -> JWT via anon getUser 401 -> plan allowlist hasOwnProperty 400 -> lifetime_count() rpc 409 at 100 -> reuse/create stripe customer (persist id via service role) -> Checkout Session (payment vs subscription mode, user_id in client_reference_id + metadata + subscription_data.metadata) -> {url}. Stripe errors caught -> plain 500, no detail leak. Live curls land in B3-4.

stories.title: Edge Function stripe-webhook (signatures, idempotency, only-writer, cap)
stories.description: supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts: constructEventAsync signature verify (400 on bad sig), stripe_events insert-or-skip idempotency, checkout.session.completed -> is_pro/plan/stripe_customer_id via service role, subscription.updated -> is_pro by status, subscription.deleted -> demote (never demote lifetime), deployed --no-verify-jwt.
acceptanceCriteria: unsigned/bad-sig request rejected before payload use
duplicate event id is a no-op

chromeVerification.setup: deno check + code review pre-deploy; live stripe trigger tests in B3-4
assertions: deno check supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/index.ts exits 0
signature verification precedes any JSON.parse/use of the body in the code path
every entitlement write goes through the service-role client

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED. deno check exits 0. Signature: raw body read as text -> constructEventAsync with SubtleCryptoProvider BEFORE any payload use; the only parsed object is the verified event. Idempotency: claim event.id in stripe_events FIRST (23505 conflict -> ack duplicate), release the claim + 500 on processing failure so Stripe retries. checkout.session.completed: user_id from metadata/client_reference_id, missing metadata -> ack-and-ignore (not ours) to avoid infinite retries; paid lifetime sessions always honored, over-cap logged loudly. subscription.updated/deleted match by stripe_customer_id with .neq(plan,'lifetime') so lifetime is never demoted. All writes via service-role client. Live stripe trigger tests land in B3-4.

stories.title: Deploy gate + live billing round trip (LB secrets, then I drive)
stories.description: LB runs runbook steps (secrets, price config, migration 0003, deploys, Stripe webhook endpoint). Then machine verification: curl 401 (no JWT), 400 (bad plan), create-checkout with a real JWT returns a checkout.stripe.com URL; drive the TEST checkout page with card 4242...; webhook flips is_pro/plan in profiles (verified via Supabase); stripe trigger customer.subscription.deleted flips it back; duplicate webhook delivery is a no-op.
acceptanceCriteria: full test-mode checkout flips is_pro via webhook

chromeVerification.setup: BLOCKED until LB completes runbook steps 1-5 (secrets are his). Then: real Chrome on checkout.stripe.com TEST + Supabase dashboard/REST.
flow: open returned checkout URL in a tab, pay with 4242 4242 4242 4242
assertions: create-checkout: 401 without JWT, 400 unknown plan, 200 {url} with JWT
after test payment: profiles.is_pro=true with correct plan (observed via Supabase)
after subscription.deleted trigger: is_pro=false, plan null (lifetime untouched)
stripe_events holds each event id exactly once after a forced redelivery
needsHumanEye: LB: runbook secrets/deploy/webhook-endpoint steps; real-extension end-to-end (Upgrade click -> pay -> reopen popup -> cloud unlocked)

notes: 2026-07-10: BLOCKED on LB - runbook steps 1-5 in supabase/SETUP-stripe-billing.md (Stripe secret key, price config, migration 0003 apply, deploys, webhook endpoint). Secrets are LB's by hard rule. Once done, I drive the machine assertions (curls, checkout.stripe.com test payment, Supabase verification, stripe trigger). Loop proceeds to B3-5/6/7 meanwhile.

stories.title: Extension Upgrade UI + entitlement re-read
stories.description: Plan picker in #accountSignedIn (3 token-styled rows, shown when signed in AND not pro; #accountPlan shows active plan when pro), Upgrade button -> POST functionsBase/create-checkout with JWT -> chrome.tabs.create({url}) + 'finish in the new tab, then reopen' note; 409 hides lifetime with sold-out note; 401 -> re-sign-in prompt; entitlementEpoch guards all awaits; sync-config.js gains functionsBase. Harness: fetch shim route for create-checkout + tabs.create shim.
acceptanceCriteria: picker renders only when signed-in and not pro
upgrade POSTs the chosen plan with JWT
checkout URL opened in new tab
pro account shows plan instead of picker

chromeVerification.setup: harness cloud mode variants: pb_is_pro false + signed in (picker), pb_is_pro true (no picker), fetch route 409 for lifetime; add chrome.tabs.create shim logging to __tabsCreated
flow: pick each plan and click Upgrade
assertions: picker hidden when pb_is_pro true; visible signed-in+free
POST body {plan} matches selection and Authorization header carries the session token (fetch shim log)
__tabsCreated receives the checkout URL returned by the shim route
409 route hides the lifetime row and shows sold-out copy
zero console errors
needsHumanEye: real checkout round trip (folded into B3-4 LB item)

notes: 2026-07-10: all machine assertions PASSED in harness. Free signed-in (?mode=cloud&pro=0): picker visible with 3 plans, POST body {plan:'annual'}, Authorization header === 'Bearer '+session token (verified via in-page comparison; the browser tool redacts token-shaped values so assert with verdict strings), checkout URL opened via chrome.tabs.create shim, status copy set, button re-enabled. 409 route: lifetime row hidden, selection falls back to monthly, sold-out copy, no tab. Pro variant: picker hidden, 'Plan: Founding Lifetime' line, vivid badge. Zero console errors both variants. NEW pb_plan storage key cached alongside pb_is_pro (cleared on sign-out) -> B3-7 must document it. HARNESS FIX: loader now cache-busts popup.html + all scripts (?v=timestamp) - a stale cached sync-config.js made fetch hit a relative undefined/ URL and dodge the interceptor; classic 'verifying yesterday's code' trap, now impossible.

stories.title: Sync-state hygiene: pb_sync_user reset + expiry badge + retry-pending-push
stories.description: Session stores user_id (captured with email at sign-in); pb_sync_user written when cloud sync engages; loadPrompts cloud path resets sync state on user mismatch; definitive session invalidation clears pb_is_pro (badge cannot survive expiry); popup open in cloud mode retries pending pushes (queued tombstones or updatedAt > pb_last_push) after the initial pull settles.
acceptanceCriteria: user mismatch wipes cursors+tombstones exactly once
pending push fires on open without an edit

chromeVerification.setup: harness cloud variants: (a) pb_sync_user set to a DIFFERENT user id than pb_session, stale cursors + a foreign tombstone seeded; (b) pb_session expires_at in the past + refresh route 401; (c) pb_tombstones seeded non-empty with fresh session
assertions: (a) pb_last_push/pb_last_pull/pb_tombstones removed, pb_sync_user rewritten to the session user, exactly one reset
(b) badge dimmed AND pb_is_pro false after load; no vivid flash from stale cache after settle
(c) a tombstone POST fires on open with no user edit
zero console errors in all variants

notes: 2026-07-10: PASSED, all variants observed in harness. (a) mismatch: exactly 1 resetSyncState (now also removes pb_sync_user), owner rewritten, foreign tombstone wiped, PLUS a fix found during verification: post-reset retry-push was re-uploading prompts still carrying the PREVIOUS account's uuids (PK collision with rows the new account can't update -> RLS fails the whole upsert -> sync stalls); mismatch path now strips uuids before persisting, verified 10 rows re-pushed with all-fresh uuids. (b) expired: refresh 401 -> session cleared -> pb_is_pro/pb_plan cleared + badge dimmed + signed-out block (transient refresh failures keep the badge: guarded on pb_session actually gone from storage). (c) pending: on idle open, 2 homogeneous POSTs - the 1 edited prompt + the 1 queued tombstone, queue flushed, cursor advanced, no user action. Regression: plain cloud open = 0 POSTs, uuids untouched. Session now carries user_id (sync-auth fetchUser); getSession returns userId.

stories.description: prompt-box-privacy-practices.md: pb_* keys disclosure, sync-or-local storage line, changelog table row. Project CLAUDE.md Data Schema: same keys incl. pb_sync_user. Verify store listing needs no permission-change edits (checkout is a plain tab). NO version bump / CHANGELOG (store-upload prep only).
acceptanceCriteria: every pb_* key documented in both files

assertions: grep finds pb_session, pb_is_pro, pb_sync_offer_dismissed, pb_last_push, pb_last_pull, pb_tombstones, pb_sync_user in BOTH prompt-box-privacy-practices.md and CLAUDE.md
manifest.json version still 3.4.0
